text: Hi Vijay R, i am from Hivericks. I see we spoke recently. Is now a good time?

content: CONTEXT SUMMARY: User engaged in a conversation of 12 turns but AI parsing was inconclusive. Assumed interested.

text: Looks like you're ready to take the power charge out of your devices! What's the plan with this XOptimus Smart Charger?
Uh I don't have time as of now. So just say the price and is it only available from Highway.
The XOptimus Smart Charger (Wall Adapter) normally retails for ₹1,499, but we're offering a special deal on Highway.
Okay. Okay. Okay. Okay, I'm just hanging up the call.
Alright, sounds good! Have a great day and we'll catch you later!
